structs.name: FB_Delay

parameters.description: The interpolation method to use. See the struct [Interp](MMMWorld.md#struct-interp) for interpolation options.
parameters.name: interp

parameters.description: Whether to apply ADAA distortion to the feedback signal instead of standard tanh.
parameters.name: ADAA_dist

parameters.description: The [oversampling](Oversampling.md) index for ADAA distortion. 0 = no oversampling, 1 = 2x, 2 = 4x, 3 = 8x, 4 = 16x.
parameters.name: os_index

structs.signature: struct FB_Delay[num_chans: Int = 1, interp: Int = Interp.lagrange4, ADAA_dist: Bool = False, os_index: Int = 0]
structs.summary: A feedback delay structured like a Comb filter, but with possible feedback coefficient above 1 due to an integrated tanh function.
